questions.question: Why can adding more features actually make a model perform worse?
questions.questionZh: 为什么增加更多特征（features）反而会导致模型（model）性能下降？
options: More features always improve model accuracy
Irrelevant features add noise, increase overfitting risk, and dilute the signal from useful features
Models have a hard limit on the number of features they can accept
More features make the model run out of memory
optionsZh: 增加更多特征（Features）总能提升模型准确率（Model Accuracy）
无关特征（Irrelevant features）会引入噪声，增加过拟合（Overfitting）的风险，并稀释有效特征所传递的信号。
模型对其可接受的特征（features）数量存在硬性限制。
特征 (Features) 过多会导致模型内存不足 (Out of Memory)。
questions.explanation: Irrelevant features give the model opportunities to overfit on noise in the training data. They increase dimensionality, making the data sparser and distances less meaningful (curse of dimensionality).
questions.explanationZh: 无关特征（Irrelevant features）会使模型有机会对训练数据中的噪声（Noise）产生过拟合（Overfitting）。它们会增加维度（Dimensionality），导致数据更加稀疏，并使距离度量失去意义（即维度灾难 Curse of dimensionality）。

questions.question: What is the key difference between filter and wrapper feature selection methods?
questions.questionZh: 过滤法（Filter）与包装法（Wrapper）特征选择方法之间的关键区别是什么？
options: Filter methods use a model to evaluate features; wrapper methods use statistics
Filter methods score features using statistics without a model; wrapper methods train a model to evaluate feature subsets
Filter methods are always more accurate than wrapper methods
Wrapper methods can only select one feature at a time
optionsZh: 过滤法（Filter methods）使用模型来评估特征；包装法（Wrapper methods）使用统计方法。
过滤法（Filter methods）无需依赖模型，仅通过统计方法对特征进行评分；包装法（Wrapper methods）则通过训练模型来评估特征子集。
过滤法（Filter methods）的准确率始终高于包装法（Wrapper methods）。
包装法（Wrapper methods）每次只能选择一个特征（feature）。
questions.explanation: Filter methods (variance threshold, mutual information, correlation) score features with statistical measures. Wrapper methods (RFE, forward selection) train models repeatedly to evaluate different feature subsets.
questions.explanationZh: 过滤法 (Filter methods)（如方差阈值 (variance threshold)、互信息 (mutual information) 和相关性 (correlation)）利用统计指标对特征进行评分。包装法 (Wrapper methods)（如递归特征消除 (RFE) 和前向选择 (forward selection)）通过反复训练模型来评估不同的特征子集。

questions.question: Mutual information can detect relationships that Pearson correlation cannot. What kind?
questions.questionZh: 互信息（Mutual Information）能够检测到皮尔逊相关系数（Pearson Correlation）无法识别的关系。具体是哪类关系？
options: Linear relationships between continuous features
Nonlinear relationships such as quadratic or periodic dependencies
Relationships between categorical features only
Relationships that require more than 1000 data points
optionsZh: 连续特征之间的线性关系 (Linear relationships between continuous features)
诸如二次（quadratic）或周期性依赖（periodic dependencies）等非线性关系（Nonlinear relationships）
仅类别特征 (categorical features) 之间的关系
需要超过1000个数据点的关系
questions.explanation: Pearson correlation only measures linear association. A quadratic relationship (y = x^2) has zero correlation but high mutual information. MI captures any statistical dependency between variables.
questions.explanationZh: 皮尔逊相关系数 (Pearson correlation) 仅用于衡量线性关联 (linear association)。二次关系 (quadratic relationship)（如 y = x^2）的相关性为零，但互信息 (mutual information) 却很高。互信息 (MI) 能够捕捉变量之间的任意统计依赖 (statistical dependency)。

questions.question: L1 (Lasso) regularization performs feature selection as part of training. How?
questions.questionZh: L1 正则化（L1 Regularization，即 Lasso）在训练（Training）过程中会执行特征选择（Feature Selection）。这是如何实现的？
options: It removes features with low variance before training starts
It drives the weights of irrelevant features to exactly zero, effectively eliminating them from the model
It ranks features by correlation with the target
It trains separate models for each feature
optionsZh: 它会在训练开始前移除低方差 (low variance) 的特征 (features)。
它会将无关特征（irrelevant features）的权重（weights）精确压缩至零，从而有效地将它们从模型中剔除。
它根据与目标变量 (target) 的相关性对特征 (features) 进行排序。
它为每个特征训练独立的模型。
questions.explanation: L1 regularization adds |w| penalty to the loss. The geometry of the L1 constraint (diamond shape) causes some weight solutions to land exactly at zero, producing sparse models that automatically select features.
questions.explanationZh: L1正则化（L1 Regularization）会在损失（Loss）中添加 |w| 惩罚项。L1约束（L1 Constraint）的几何形状（菱形）会使部分权重解恰好落在零点，从而生成能够自动进行特征选择（Feature Selection）的稀疏模型（Sparse Models）。

questions.question: RFE removes the least important feature and retrains. Why is this better than just removing all low-importance features at once?
questions.questionZh: 递归特征消除（Recursive Feature Elimination）会移除最不重要的特征并重新训练模型。为什么这种方法比一次性移除所有低重要性特征更好？
options: It is not better -- removing all at once is always preferred
Feature importances change as features are removed, so iterative removal accounts for interactions between features
RFE uses a different importance metric than single-step removal
Removing one at a time is only necessary for neural networks
optionsZh: 这并非更优方案——始终建议一次性全部移除。
特征重要性（Feature Importance）会随着特征的移除而发生变化，因此迭代移除（Iterative Removal）能够考虑到特征之间的交互作用（Feature Interactions）。
递归特征消除（RFE）所采用的重要性度量指标与单步移除（single-step removal）不同。
逐一移除仅对神经网络 (Neural Networks) 是必要的。
questions.explanation: Feature importances are relative. When a correlated feature is removed, the importance of its counterpart may increase. Iterative removal lets the model reassess importances at each step, capturing these interactions.
questions.explanationZh: 特征重要性（Feature Importance）是相对的。当移除某个相关特征时，其对应特征的重要性可能会增加。迭代移除（Iterative Removal）使模型能够在每一步重新评估重要性，从而捕捉这些交互作用。
